de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class WindowUserInterfaceControl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.control.AbstractUserInterfaceControl
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.ui.AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.WindowUserInterfaceControl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    RuleCompletionHandler, UserInterfaceControl, ProofDisposedListener, ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProblemLoaderControl, ProofEnvironmentListener, ProverTaskListener, ProgressMonitor, EventListener

    public class WindowUserInterfaceControl
extends AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
    Implementation of UserInterfaceControl which controls the MainWindow with the typical user interface of KeY.
    Author:
    Mattias Ulbrich

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProgressMonitor

      void loadProblem(File file)
      loads the problem or proof from the given file
      void loadProblem(File file, List<File> classPath, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes)
      loads the problem or proof from the given file
      void notify(NotificationEvent event) 
      void notifyAutoModeBeingStarted()
      these methods are called immediately before automode is started to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to a waiting cursor
      void notifyAutomodeStopped()
      these methods are called when automode has been stopped to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to the default
      void openExamples()
      called to open the build in examples
      void progressStarted(Object sender) 
      void progressStopped(Object sender)

      • taskProgress

        public void taskProgress(int position)
        Description copied from interface: ProverTaskListener
        Called when progress is made on a task. This method is called after every single step of the task
        Specified by:
        taskProgress in interface ProverTaskListener
        Overrides:
        taskProgress in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        position - indicates how much work has been done relative to the value of size passed in #taskStarted(String, int).

        taskStarted in interface ProverTaskListener

      • setMaximum

        public void setMaximum(int maximum)
        Description copied from interface: ProgressMonitor
        Set the maximum number of steps for this task.
        Parameters:
        maximum - maximum number of steps, >=0.

      • setProgress

        public void setProgress(int progress)
        Description copied from interface: ProgressMonitor
        Set the progress achieved so far. The parameter progress has to be >=0 and <= to the maximum value previously set with ProgressMonitor.setMaximum(int).
        Parameters:
        progress - number of steps completed

      • notifyAutoModeBeingStarted

        public void notifyAutoModeBeingStarted()
        Description copied from class: AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        these methods are called immediately before automode is started to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to a waiting cursor
        Overrides:
        notifyAutoModeBeingStarted in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl

        these methods are called when automode has been stopped to ensure that the GUI can respond in a reasonable way, e.g., change the cursor to the default
        Overrides:

      • completeAndApplyTacletMatch

                               Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: RuleCompletionHandler
        called to complete and apply a taclet instantiations
        Parameters:
        models - the partial models with all different possible instantiations found automatically
        goal - the Goal where to apply

      • confirmTaskRemoval

        public boolean confirmTaskRemoval(String string)
        Description copied from class: AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        asks if removal of a task is completed. This is useful to display a dialog to the user and asking her or if on command line to allow it always.
        Overrides:
        confirmTaskRemoval in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        Returns:
        true if removal has been granted

      • openExamples

        Description copied from class: AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        called to open the build in examples

        openExamples in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl

      • completeBuiltInRuleApp

        public IBuiltInRuleApp completeBuiltInRuleApp(IBuiltInRuleApp app,
                                     Goal goal,
                                     boolean forced)
        Description copied from interface: RuleCompletionHandler
        completes rule applications of built in rules
        Parameters:
        app - the DefaultBuiltInRuleApp to be completed
        goal - the Goal where the app will later be applied to
        forced - a boolean indicating if the rule should be applied without any additional interaction from the user provided that the application object can be made complete automatically
        Returns:
        a complete app or null if no completion was possible

      • getMediator

        public KeYMediator getMediator()
        Returns the used KeYMediator.
        Specified by:
        getMediator in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        Returns:
        The used KeYMediator.

      • load

        public AbstractProblemLoader load(Profile profile,
                         File file,
                         List<File> classPath,
                         File bootClassPath,
                         List<File> includes,
                         Properties poPropertiesToForce,
                         boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs)
                           throws ProblemLoaderException

        Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.

        The loading is performed in the Thread of the caller!

        Specified by:
        load in interface UserInterfaceControl
        Overrides:
        load in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        profile - An optional Profile to use. If it is null the default profile KeYMediator#getDefaultProfile() is used.
        file - The java file to open.
        classPath - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        poPropertiesToForce - Some optional Properties for the PO which extend or overwrite saved PO Properties.
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true #profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        Returns:
        The opened AbstractProblemLoader.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • saveProof

        public File saveProof(Proof proof,
             String fileExtension)
        save proof in file. If autoSave is on, this will potentially overwrite already existing proof files with the same name. Otherwise the save dialog pops up. For loaded proofs both are turned off by default, i.e. only manual saving is possible, and the save dialog never pops up automatically (except for hitting the "Save ..." or "Save current proof" button).

      • fileName

        protected static Pair<File,String> fileName(Proof proof,
                         String fileExtension)

      • proofDisposing

        public void proofDisposing(ProofDisposedEvent e)
        When a Proof is going to be disposed.
        Specified by:
        proofDisposing in interface ProofDisposedListener
        Overrides:
        proofDisposing in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        e - The event.

      • selectProofObligation

        public boolean selectProofObligation(InitConfig initConfig)
        Description copied from interface: ProblemLoaderControl
        This method is called if no IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer was created via #createProofObligationContainer() and can be overwritten for instance to open the proof management dialog as done by ProblemLoader.
        Returns:
        true if the proof obligation was selected, and false if action was aborted

      • registerProofAggregate

        public void registerProofAggregate(ProofAggregate pa)
        Description copied from class: AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        Registers an already created ProofAggregate in this UserInterfaceControl.
        Specified by:
        registerProofAggregate in interface UserInterfaceControl
        Overrides:
        registerProofAggregate in class AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        pa - The ProofAggregate to register.

        The loading has started.
        Specified by:
        loadingStarted in interface ProblemLoaderControl
        Overrides:
        loadingStarted in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.

      • loadingFinished

        public void loadingFinished(AbstractProblemLoader loader,
                   IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer poContainer,
                   ProofAggregate proofList,
                   AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult result)
                     throws ProblemLoaderException
        Description copied from interface: ProblemLoaderControl
        The loading has stopped.
        Specified by:
        loadingFinished in interface ProblemLoaderControl
        Overrides:
        loadingFinished in class AbstractUserInterfaceControl
        Parameters:
        loader - The source AbstractProblemLoader.
        poContainer - The loaded IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer.
        proofList - The created ProofAggregate.
        result - The occurred AbstractProblemLoader.ReplayResult.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.

      • loadInMainWindow

        public static KeYEnvironment<WindowUserInterfaceControl> loadInMainWindow(File location,
                                                          List<File> classPaths,
                                                          File bootClassPath,
                                                          List<File> includes,
                                                          boolean makeMainWindowVisible)
                                                                   throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment with KeY's MainWindow.
        Parameters:
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        makeMainWindowVisible - Make KeY's MainWindow visible if it is not already visible?
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception

      • loadInMainWindow

        public static KeYEnvironment<WindowUserInterfaceControl> loadInMainWindow(Profile profile,
                                                          File location,
                                                          List<File> classPaths,
                                                          File bootClassPath,
                                                          List<File> includes,
                                                          boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs,
                                                          boolean makeMainWindowVisible)
                                                                   throws ProblemLoaderException
        Loads the given location and returns all required references as KeYEnvironment with KeY's MainWindow.
        Parameters:
        profile - The Profile to use.
        location - The location to load.
        classPaths - The class path entries to use.
        bootClassPath - The boot class path to use.
        includes - Optional includes to consider.
        makeMainWindowVisible - Make KeY's MainWindow visible if it is not already visible?
        forceNewProfileOfNewProofs - true #profileOfNewProofs will be used as Profile of new proofs, false Profile specified by problem file will be used for new proofs.
        Returns:
        The KeYEnvironment which contains all references to the loaded location.
        Throws:
        ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception
